_meta.note: GP excludes specialist, non_clinical, org_only_npi, da_unverified, duplicate_location. Massachusetts parked, not included.
hazard_mitigations: No transitive union-find chaining across anchor types
EIN clustering: excluded placeholders 000000000, 111111111, 999999999 and EINs <9 digits
EIN and auth_official clusters reported independently; max-of-two used only for summary, never merged transitively

task1_column_inventory.note: Coverage over 4,440 IL GP NPIs (via primary_npi or org_npi from practice_locations)

ein.note: All 1,197 are real EINs (placeholders already excluded). 000000000 placeholder appeared in parent_iusa, not ein.

parent_iusa.note: 1,471 of 1,494 are placeholder '000000000' (Evenly Technologies junk). Only 23 are real parent IUSA values.

affiliated_dso.note: 202 at location level (practice_locations); 344 at NPI level across same IL GP NPIs

da_corporate_employees.note: Essentially empty — Data Axle corporate employee rollup not populated

franchise_name.note: Includes many benign values — not all franchises are DSO-like

iusa_number.note: Mostly the Evenly placeholder set — unreliable anchor

mailing_address.note: Nearly universal, but shared mailing alone known to be too noisy for clustering (documented hazard)

most_useful_anchors: authorized_official (last+first_initial) via practices join: 49.2% coverage, excludes common surnames
weak_anchors_avoid: mailing_address alone: known to weld unrelated practices via shared registered-agent address

ein_clusters.method: EIN from practice_locations; exclude NULL, empty, <9 digits, placeholders 000000000/111111111/999999999; group by EIN; count DISTINCT location_ids

notable_multi_loc_ein_clusters.names: ELMHURST DENTAL GROUP / Dental Professionals of IL

auth_official_clusters.method: authorized_official_last_name + SUBSTR(first_name,1,1) from practices joined to IL GP location_ids via primary_npi/org_npi; exclude common surnames

large_clusters_4plus.title: MANAGER
large_clusters_4plus.names: OGDEN VALLEY DENTAL, TWO RIVERS DENTAL, ASHTON DENTAL, OSWEGO DENTAL, TROY DENTAL, SMILE TOWN DENTAL, GENTLE DENTAL GROUP, SIMPLY DENTAL, SMILE VIEW DENTAL
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: T3/T4 — affiliated_dso=Gentle Dental, already partially classified; some locations remain independent-classified

large_clusters_4plus.title: MANAGER CREDENTIALING
large_clusters_4plus.names: ILLINOIS DENTAL PROVIDERS (multiple), DR. RAINA, MECKLER DENTAL PROVIDERS, DR. ZASSO & ASSOC
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: T3/T4 — friendly-PC shell PCs under Western Dental brand; some solo_established remain unflipped

large_clusters_4plus.title: PRESIDENT
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: T3/T4 — Brite Dental is Dental 360 operating brand; some solo_established remain

large_clusters_4plus.title: OWNER/DENTIST

large_clusters_4plus.title: PRESIDENT

large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: T2 or T3 AMBIGUOUS — 8 locations under METROSMILES local brand. Could be dentist-owned multi-site T2, or PE/MSO-backed T3. Requires web verification.

large_clusters_4plus.title: GENERAL MANAGER / COO
large_clusters_4plus.names: 1ST FAMILY DENTAL (multiple), DENTAL CORPORATE USA, ARMITAGE PROFESSIONAL SERVICES, LITTLE VILLAGE DENTAL
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: T3/T4 — 1st Family Dental regional chain; some solo_established remain unflipped

large_clusters_4plus.title: C.E.O.
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: STRONG T3 SIGNAL — CEO title + multi-loc under group brand, all independent-classified. Priority web-verify candidate.

large_clusters_4plus.title: VP OF OPERATIONS
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: STRONG T3 SIGNAL — VP Operations title + 7 locations. Priority web-verify candidate.

large_clusters_4plus.title: CREDENTIALING COORDINATOR
large_clusters_4plus.names: TRU DENTAL ILLINOIS P.C., DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS P.C.

large_clusters_4plus.title: AGENT

large_clusters_4plus.title: CFO
large_clusters_4plus.names: BDD JHG PC, BDD OF ILLINOIS P.C., BDD AFDS PC
large_clusters_4plus.tier_assessment: STRONG T3 SIGNAL — CFO title on a BDD-branded chain. PE/MSO-backed likely. Priority web-verify.

large_clusters_4plus.title: OWNER

large_clusters_4plus.title: DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS
large_clusters_4plus.names: PRAIRIE DENTAL PARTNERS LLC, ALL PERFECT SMILES OF BEVERLY PC, PRAIRIE DENTAL OF OAK PARK LLC, ALL PERFECT SMILES OF ELMHURST PC

task3_location_count_distribution.note: Owner cluster size = max(EIN cluster size, auth_official cluster size) per location. No transitive chaining.

no_anchor.note: No real EIN and no non-excluded auth_official found for these locations. Cannot cluster-classify.

sz1_solo.note: Owner signal found but this location is the only one under that anchor. Candidate T1.

sz2.note: 2-location owner cluster. Candidate T2 (dentist mini-chain). Some may be T3 if PE-backed.

sz3.note: 3-location owner cluster. T2 or T3 ambiguous without web verify.

sz4.note: 4-location owner cluster. Likely T2 or T3.

sz5plus.note: 5+ location owner cluster. Mix of already-classified T4 (e.g., Heartland, Dental Dreams) and unclassified T3 candidates.

single_location_candidate_t1.caveat: Candidate only — 1,846 have no anchor data at all, and some of the 1,936 anchor-confirmed solos may be misclassified friendly-PC. True T1 count requires web verification.

multi_location_non_corporate.note: These are already-classified independent locs that share an owner anchor with 2+ other IL GP locations. Candidates for T2 or T3.

matching_beyond_current_corporate.note: ZIP-alone match is too broad (2384). Exact ZIP+phone match = 9 real candidates. Fuzzy phone = 146 (unreliable). The 9 exact ZIP+phone matches are the most actionable.

confident_t4_assessment.note: Current entity_classification=dso_national (167) + dso_regional (82). Additional 9 exact ZIP+phone matches to dso_locations are candidates for reclassification.

small_group_different_surname.note: 2-3 providers, different surnames. Mostly T1 independent groups, some T2.

large_group_different_surname.note: 4+ providers, different surnames. Higher T2/T3 likelihood, especially those with corporate-function officer titles.

family_practice_shared_surname.note: Shared-surname multi-provider. Strong T2 signal — family-owned dentist practices. Unlikely PE-backed.

provider_count_distribution_multi_provid.note: Large practices (10+ providers): 39 locations. These are strong large-group T2 or T3 candidates.

T1_solo_no_cluster.basis: solo_established/new/inactive minus those in 2+ anchor clusters (~2,244+19+4 - 235 clustered = ~2,032). Some may be misclassified T3.
T1_solo_no_cluster.caveat: 1,846 additional have no anchor at all — cannot confirm or deny multi-location ownership

T2_family_groups.basis: family_practice classification = shared-surname multi-provider. Very unlikely PE-backed. Dentist-owned T2.

large_group.note: Could be dentist-owned T2 OR PE-backed T3. CEO/VP of Operations titles on 9 of these are strong T3 signals.

small_group_in_owner_cluster.note: Small groups that appear in 2+ auth_official or EIN clusters — T2 or T3

solo_established_in_owner_cluster.note: Solo-classified but same owner has 2+ locations — friendly-PC T3 candidate or genuine T2 mini-chain

confidence_ceiling.note: ~700 locations need web verification to distinguish T2 dentist-chain from T3 stealth-DSO

priority_t3_candidates_for_web_verify.signal: CFO title, BDD initials suggest PE platform

independent_locs_with_corporate_title_si.note: 65 currently independent-classified IL GP locs where the authorized_official has a corporate-function title. Strong T3 screening signal.

confirmed_floor.description: Current branded/known DSO (dso_national + dso_regional). Hard-evidence floor.

with_top_unflipped_stealth_candidates.description: Adding the ~56 highest-confidence T3 candidates from large clusters with CEO/CFO/VP titles (BRUNETTI, GONZALEZ/S, JORBIN, GONZALEZ/O, TSALIAGOS, LABINOV) + 9 ZIP+phone DSO-location matches.

realistic_upper_bound.description: If all 65 independent locs with corporate-function titles are T3, plus confirmed floor.

dso_pe_penetration_T3_T4.note: True T3+T4 is likely 6-9% of IL GP locations. The ADA HPI per-dentist anchor of 14.6% is a DIFFERENT unit (per dentist, not per location). The gap between 5.61% location-floor and 14.6% per-dentist rate is partially density-driven (corporate offices employ 2x dentists) and partially from undetected T3.

low_estimate_T4_plus_family_groups.description: T4 confirmed (249) + family_practice T2 (193). Conservative — excludes large/small groups.

mid_estimate_T4_plus_family_plus_multi_l.description: T4 (249) + family (193) + large_group (255) + independent in 2+ EIN cluster (42) + approximate clustered solos. This assumes most large_groups are T2.

high_estimate_T4_plus_family_plus_all_gr.description: T4 + family + large_group + clustered small_group (128). Upper bound if most multi-provider non-corporate groups are T2.

consolidated_T2_T3_T4.note: Consolidated range depends on whether large_group and small_group are T2 (dentist-owned) or T1 (independent multi-provider). Most are T2 by intent — a dental group of 4+ dentists at one location is typically not a solo-independent. True consolidated % is likely 10-19%.

task7_headline_magnitude.single_sentence_summary: IL Chicagoland branded/PE-backed DSO penetration (T3+T4) = 5.61% confirmed floor, likely 7-9% with stealth undetected; full consolidated (T2+T3+T4, including dentist-owned multi-location groups) = 10-19% range depending on how large_group and family_practice are assigned.
task7_headline_magnitude.biggest_unknown: The 1,846 IL GP locations with NO owner anchor (no real EIN, no usable authorized_official) represent 41.6% of the market — impossible to cluster-classify without additional web verification or Data Axle enrichment.
